V-M-035.checks: Backup and restore contract must preserve PostgreSQL data, runtime secrets, AWG state, and VPN device/client linkage.
V-M-035.commands: planned restore dry-run: pg_dump/pg_restore validation plus checksum manifest verification

module-checks.check-1: Backup manifest names every required artifact without exposing secret values.
module-checks.check-2: Restore validation compares table counts and selected integrity invariants.
module-checks.check-3: AWG profile, subnet settings, and existing client compatibility are included in restore checks.

scenarios.scenario-1: Restored database contains matching users, subscriptions, payments, devices, VPN clients, and migration state.
scenarios.scenario-2: Backup bundle lacks .env/runtime secret material needed to boot replacement servers.
scenarios.scenario-3: Backup bundle lacks AWG profile or device-client state needed to preserve client connectivity.
